title: cerastium diffusum subsp. diffusum
intro: Cerastium diffusum subsp. diffusum, also known as creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
